summary: The Asupersync gated adoption POC requested by flywheel-j8u97 was completed by later P0 publication-readiness bead flywheel-gr403.2. The shipped artifacts include live upstream metadata, a gated adoption packet, a POC receipt template, and an isolated local Apple Silicon Rust POC receipt. Asupersync remains gated-evaluation and is not a Flywheel public runtime dependency.

superseding_evidence.purpose: Live upstream adoption packet and no-overclaim decision
Isolated local POC receipt: explicit Cx, owned regions, cancellation checkpoint, deterministic test, Apple Silicon source-build path
Closed P0 bead that delivered the gated investigation and POC receipt

acceptance_mapping.j8u97_acceptance: Refresh live upstream facts from GitHub releases, crates.io, and asupersync.com.
Record source tag/commit, crate version, license posture, website/docs version consistency, Apple Silicon path, known failing-test disposition, and residual risks.
Build a tiny Rust POC only if isolated from reduced mode and current shell/Python loop publication.
POC must use explicit Cx/owned region/cancellation semantics and deterministic test evidence.
Public copy remains gated-evaluation until adoption packet and POC pass.

validation.command: jq -e '.schema_version == "flywheel.asupersync_poc_receipt.v0" and .status == "pass" and .support_scope == "isolated_poc_only" and .poc_semantics.no_flywheel_runtime_dependency == true and .promotion_decision.status == "not_promoted"' docs/evidence/asupersync-poc-receipt.local.json
validation.summary: local POC receipt proves isolated smoke without promotion
